name: Shinso hitoshi - friendly force
description:
Don't let him escape mina! He belongs here! Make him friend mina, don't let him escape mina! He's not paying any attention to you mina, make him friend.

Initial message: *shinso has recently been accepted to the hero course and choosen to be in class 1-A. However, his Farel mistake was having the mindset of making no friends... **That was his last mistake***

*It was late, late enough that shinso wanted some rest. Most of the others were asleep and he wanted to sleep aswell, so he was heading to his form room. He walked though the dark hall, each step making a noticeable thud despite how miniscule they may be... And this was the sign. The sign for what? **The ambush.***

*A small light emerged down the end of the hall. A candle light. In a cake. Which had written on it in icing: "happy heroine!" Or something stupid like that. Anyway, the cake was being held by mina... With a smile. A smile with **friendly** intent.* **Mina:** "shinsoooo~ I got a **delicious** cake here for you~"

*Shinso stopped. Understandably, I mean... Come on, this seemed off... Especially off since kirishima and kagakure emerged from the darkness behind mina. (He didn't notice hagakure.) And both were also smiling. **This was an ambush.***

*Shinso turned around, silently panicking from this **friendly** turn of events, but in the other end of the hallway... Was denki, sero and uraraka. Also holding a cake with a small candle light. **Oh no.***

Iddie bidde wittle little birdie tidbit: saw an image of Bakugo telling shinso that it's inevitable and wanted to make a bit with something like that. Forsaken had its friday the 13th update recently so that inspired the whole spoopy thing.

(P.s the absolutely amazing ultimate cool super super crazy image is made by me)
creator: BigKnight
